jobBoards.name: Remote OK
jobBoards.notes: Returns array; first item is metadata object, skip it. Filter by tags.

jobBoards.name: Web3.career
jobBoards.notes: Also has tag filters via URL params

jobBoards.name: UseWeb3 Jobs
jobBoards.notes: No public API; playwright scrape or check for unofficial API

jobBoards.name: HN Who Is Hiring (monthly)
jobBoards.notes: Monthly thread; parse top result, then fetch comments from HN API. Pattern: https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/items/{story_id}

jobBoards.name: Wellfound (AngelList Talent)
jobBoards.notes: No public API. Check manually or via saved search emails. Profile already set up.

jobBoards.name: LinkedIn Jobs
jobBoards.notes: No public API. Set up job alerts for: 'Senior Backend Engineer remote', 'Blockchain Engineer remote', 'Backend Lead remote'

jobBoards.name: Work at a Startup (YC)
jobBoards.notes: YC companies; filter by role and remote. Worth a weekly manual pass.

jobBoards.name: Pallet (team boards)
jobBoards.notes: Many crypto teams run Pallet boards. Scrape individual boards or use their public listing.

jobBoards.name: Greenhouse (direct API — per company)
jobBoards.notes: Public API, no auth. Returns full JD content. Used for companies in the watchlist.

jobBoards.name: Lever (direct API — per company)
jobBoards.notes: Public API, no auth. Returns structured posting JSON.

companies.name: LI.FI
companies.notes: Warm referral — Julian. Already applied (rejected on Perps role). Keep watching.

companies.name: Wormhole Labs
companies.notes: Top fit. Already reviewed; best single-requirement fit of crypto-infra cluster.

companies.name: Pyth Network
companies.notes: Previously reviewed. Watch for backend roles.

companies.name: OP Labs (Optimism)
companies.notes: Strong backend infra team. Go is the main language.

companies.name: Tether
companies.notes: Applied — Backend Engineer Wallets. Track status.

companies.name: Xapo Bank
companies.notes: Already reviewed. Flagged reach vs attainable roles.

companies.name: Gelato Network
companies.notes: Strong fit — on-chain automation bots is your Kleros speciality.

companies.name: Alchemy
companies.notes: One of the strongest infra plays. Multiple slugs possible.

companies.name: Helius (Solana RPC)
companies.notes: Solana exposure not deep but transferable.

companies.name: Safe (Gnosis Safe)
companies.notes: Multi-sig infra — strong overlap with your event-driven Kleros work.

companies.name: dYdX
companies.notes: Moved to Cosmos. Go/Python backend stack.

companies.name: Coinbase
companies.notes: Large corp. Watch for infrastructure/protocol engineering roles specifically.

companies.name: zkSync / Matter Labs
companies.notes: Rust-heavy. Worth watching for TypeScript-adjacent infra roles.

companies.name: Starkware / StarkNet
companies.notes: Rust/Cairo dominant. Watch for non-core-prover roles.

companies.name: EigenLayer / Eigen Labs
companies.notes: Previously reviewed — substance gap in agent runtime. Backend infra roles may be better fit.

companies.name: Trail of Bits
companies.notes: OSCP + Kleros audit experience directly relevant.

companies.name: Spearbit
companies.notes: Contractor model; apply as associate auditor.

companies.name: Perplexity
companies.notes: Strong fit identified. API platform team.

companies.name: Modal
companies.notes: Small, elite team. Python/Go. Strong infra fit.

companies.name: Exa AI
companies.notes: Small team, backend API focus — good fit.

companies.name: Helicone
companies.notes: TypeScript backend, small team. Strong fit.

companies.name: Vercel
companies.notes: Strong fit identified. Infrastructure/platform eng roles.

companies.name: Redpanda Data
companies.notes: Kafka expertise maps perfectly. Watch for non-C++ roles.

companies.name: Temporal Technologies
companies.notes: Go-heavy. Event-driven workflow engine — strong conceptual fit.

companies.name: Trigger.dev
companies.notes: TypeScript/NestJS. Small team. Very strong stack fit.

companies.name: Cloudflare
companies.notes: Large corp. Watch for Workers Platform / D1 team roles.

companies.name: TigerBeetle
companies.notes: Zig-based. Rare openings, extraordinary engineering standards.

companies.name: Stripe
companies.notes: Very competitive. Watch for India-eligible remote roles.

companies.name: Datadog
companies.notes: Large corp. Watch for SRE/infra eng roles.

companies.name: Portkey
companies.notes: India-based, strong fit for remote roles.
